initial_outreach.ai_instructions: Keep it brief and personal. Reference the specific connection point if available. No hard sell. Tone: warm, direct, professional.

follow_up.ai_instructions: Short and punchy. Lead with the data point. One clear CTA. No repeating the initial outreach pitch.

engaged.ai_instructions: Conversational and helpful. Reference their specific interest or question if available. Goal: get them on a call with Paul.

post_meeting.ai_instructions: Direct and candid. Ask for honest feedback. Proactively address the most common objections. Tone: confident but not pushy.

due_diligence.ai_instructions: Supportive and proactive. Offer to clarify specifics. Show awareness that DD is a thorough process. Tone: patient, detail-oriented.

on_hold.ai_instructions: Substantive update only. Lead with something concrete — new performance data, a milestone, or market-relevant insight. Never a naked check-in. Tone: informative, low-pressure.

declined_cold.ai_instructions: Very light touch. Lead with a compelling reason to reconnect — major milestone, new fund, or significant performance. Tone: respectful, no pressure, acknowledging they passed previously.
